auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the platform
auth.inviteOnly: This platform is exclusive to invited students. If you received an invitation email, use the credentials provided.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive reset instructions
auth.resetPasswordSent: Check your email for password reset instructions.
auth.acceptInvitationSubtitle: Set your password to access the platform
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.noCourses: You are not enrolled in any courses yet.
dashboard.noCoursesHint: If you received an invitation, your course will appear here automatically. Contact the administrator if you need help.
dashboard.onboardingSubtitle: Follow these steps to complete the course and earn your certificate.
dashboard.onboardingStep1Desc: Watch the videos and read the content of each module in the indicated order.
dashboard.onboardingStep2Desc: Answer the quiz at the end of each module to unlock the next one.
dashboard.onboardingStep3Desc: After completing all modules, take the final exam to earn your certificate.

course.title: Course
course.allModulesCompleted: All modules completed! The final exam is now available.

quiz.title: Quiz — {module}
quiz.question: Question {current} of {total}
quiz.passedMessage: Congratulations! You have successfully completed this quiz.
quiz.failedMessage: You did not reach the minimum score. You may retake the quiz.
quiz.examPassedMessage: Congratulations! You have successfully completed the final exam. Your certificate has been generated.
quiz.examFailedMessage: You did not reach the minimum score of {threshold}%. You may retake the exam.
quiz.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit? This action cannot be undone.
quiz.submitQuizDescription: Are you sure you want to submit your answers? This action cannot be undone.
quiz.submitExamDescription: Are you sure you want to submit your answers? This action cannot be undone.

certificate.title: Certificate of Completion
certificate.forCompletion: for the successful completion of the course
certificate.verifySubtitle: Enter the certification code to verify its authenticity
certificate.verifiedMessage: This certificate is valid and was issued by the platform.
certificate.notFoundMessage: The code entered does not match any issued certificate.
certificate.noCertificates: You don't have any certificates yet. Complete a course to earn your certificate.

admin.title: Administration
admin.inviteStudentSubtitle: The student will receive an email with instructions to access the platform
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete? This action cannot be undone.

preview.banner: PREVIEW MODE — This is how students will see this content
preview.quizReadOnly: This is a read-only preview. Questions and correct answers are displayed for review.

resetProgress.title: Reset Progress
resetProgress.confirmResetAllDescription: This will delete all module progress, quiz attempts, exam attempts, and certificates for this student in "{course}". The student will start completely from scratch. This action cannot be undone.
resetProgress.confirmResetModuleDescription: This will delete the module progress and all quiz attempts for "{module}". This action cannot be undone.
resetProgress.confirmResetExamDescription: This will delete all exam attempts and certificates for this student in "{course}". Module progress will be kept intact. This action cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Questions
import.downloadTemplateDescription: Download an Excel template with the correct format and example rows. The template includes a sheet listing the available modules for this course.
import.uploadFileDescription: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV (.csv) file with questions to import.
import.importNote: Only valid rows will be imported. Rows with errors will be skipped.
import.confirmImport: Are you sure you want to import {count} question(s)? This action cannot be undone.

errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.notFoundMessage: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
errors.unauthorizedMessage: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Check your internet connection.
